What I've built

Key Projects

Fintech

SCF-LMS — Loan Management System

GitHub ↗

Full end-to-end automation of a Supply Chain Finance & Loan Management platform — covering Vendor Finance, Dealer Finance, company onboarding, invoice lifecycle, and fund disbursement flows.

  • Playwright (JS) for cross-browser E2E tests across Chromium, Firefox & WebKit
  • Validated Maker/Checker authorization matrices (AND/OR logic) end-to-end
  • Tested 20+ REST APIs using Rest Assured & Postman — caught defects before UAT
  • SQL scripts to verify loan transactions, settlement data & fund disbursement accuracy
  • Jenkins CI/CD with Allure Reports — nightly execution with step-level traceability
Playwright JavaScript Rest Assured Postman SQL Jenkins Allure
E-commerce

Shopping Cart Application

GitHub ↗

End-to-end automated testing of a full e-commerce platform — from product search through checkout and payment flows — using a POM Hybrid Framework with CI/CD integration.

  • Designed POM Hybrid Framework with Extent Reports — adopted as team standard
  • Identified 15+ critical API failures pre-release via Postman regression
  • CI/CD-driven continuous regression covering full user journeys
Selenium Java POM Postman Extent Reports Jenkins
Finance

Investec Investment System

Quality assurance for investment transaction workflows including portfolio updates, trade execution, and account balance calculations across functional, regression, and sanity testing cycles.

  • End-to-end coverage across all modules before UAT handoff — zero functional gaps
  • Collaborated with BAs to clarify domain-specific requirements
  • Defect logging, tracking, and retesting via JIRA
